Sheet: /
File: reform2-motherboard25.kicad_sch
Title: MNT Reform 2
Size: A4  Date: 2023-02-13
KiCad E.D.A.  kicad 7.0.6+dfsg-1
Rev: 2.5D-2  Id: 1/12
iMXBM internal oscillator output for PCIe1

BOOTCFG_4  0: 1-bit  1: 4-bit
BOOTCFG_15  01: SD
BOOTCFG_12  10: eMMC
BOOTCFG_10  0: eSDHC1  1: eSDHC2

ambiguities.description: R117, R118, R119 are marked NOSTUFF/DNP but exact values and net connections for R118 and R119 are partially obscured.
The exact net connections for R154 resistor value is not legible in the image.
The J19 JTAG connector visible in the schematic area is not in the grounding refdes set; could not confirm refdes.
TP8 is labeled T_PMIC_ON_REQ in the grounding nets but visually appears to connect to PMIC_ON_REQ; the exact relationship between T_PMIC_ON_REQ and PMIC_ON_REQ could not be fully resolved.
Pin assignments for U1 are dense; some pin numbers beyond 230 may have been mis-mapped due to image resolution.
